other_observers: Glenn Walbek, Loch Kilpatrick, Tim Smart
specific_location: Frontage Road North of Prospect near Colorado Welcome Center
description: "Lanky" very dark hawk.  Seen distantly in flight, reminicent of dark buteo, then seen perched facing me head-on.  Key features include yellow face, dark eye, nearly black breast and belly, reddish thighs, white vent, and black tail with broad white tip.  Hints of reddish shoulders seen but not well at the angle I was viewing.
